title: Fetal Alcohol Spectrum Disorders (FASD) Screening: MedlinePlus Medical Test
text:
If you are pregnant or trying to get pregnant and cannot stop drinking , itâs important to get help. Even if you are pregnant, it is never too late to stop drinking. Because brain growth takes place throughout pregnancy, stopping alcohol use will improve the baby's health and well-being. Your provider can recommend counseling and treatment programs .
